name: model_name
desc: Prefix for all output filenames. Use alphanumeric characters and underscores only.

name: path2output
desc: Output directory path. def_dir uses the current working directory.

name: output_format
desc: Output format. Currently only JSON is supported.

name: simplify_npoints
desc: Target number of points retained for the simplified profile arrays in each snapshot. Clamped to ≥ 20.

name: log_level
desc: Logging verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL.

name: log_console
desc: Enable terminal output for log messages.

name: log_file
desc: Write log messages to {path2output}/trinity.log.

name: log_colors
desc: Color-code terminal output by severity level.

name: mCloud
desc: Total mass of the molecular cloud.

name: sfe
desc: Star formation efficiency (0 < sfe < 1). Fraction of cloud mass converted to stars.

name: ZCloud
desc: Cloud metallicity. Currently only solar (1) is supported.

name: include_PHII
desc: Include HII pressure in P_drive. When False, P_HII is set to zero.

name: dens_profile
desc: Density profile type: densPL (power-law) or densBE (Bonnor-Ebert).

name: nCore
desc: Core number density. For homogeneous clouds (densPL_alpha=0), this is the average density.

name: nISM
desc: Ambient ISM number density.

name: rCore
desc: Core radius. Not used for homogeneous clouds.

name: densPL_alpha
desc: Power-law exponent (−2 ≤ α ≤ 0). 0 = homogeneous, −2 = isothermal sphere.

name: densBE_Omega
desc: Density contrast Ω = ρ_center / ρ_edge. Values > 14.1 indicate gravitational instability.

name: allowShellDissolution
desc: Allow shell dissolution to terminate the simulation. If False, the dissolution check is disabled.

name: stop_t_diss
desc: Duration shell_nMax must remain below nISM before dissolution is triggered.

name: stop_r
desc: Maximum shell radius. Exceeding this triggers termination. Set to None to disable.

name: stop_v
desc: Velocity threshold for numerical instability detection.

name: stop_t
desc: Maximum simulation duration. Set to None to disable.

name: stop_at_rCloud_nSnap
desc: Terminate after the shell crosses the cloud edge. None disables; 0 stops at the edge; N > 0 lets the implicit phase advance for N more snapshots before terminating.

name: coll_r
desc: Radius below which the cloud is considered completely collapsed.

name: SB99_mass
desc: Reference cluster mass used in SB99 files. Used for scaling.

name: SB99_rotation
desc: Include stellar rotation (1=yes, 0=no). Rotation extends lifetimes via internal mixing.

name: SB99_BHCUT
desc: Black hole formation threshold. Stars above this ZAMS mass collapse directly to BH without SN.

name: FB_mColdWindFrac
desc: Fraction of cold material swept up by protostellar winds.

name: FB_mColdSNFrac
desc: Fraction of cold ejecta from supernovae.

name: FB_thermCoeffWind
desc: Thermalization efficiency for stellar wind kinetic energy.

name: FB_thermCoeffSN
desc: Thermalization efficiency for supernova ejecta.

name: FB_vSN
desc: Supernova ejecta velocity.

name: adiabaticOnlyInCore
desc: Restrict adiabatic (energy-driven) phase to within core radius.

name: immediate_leak
desc: Transition immediately to momentum-driven phase when bubble bursts.

name: phaseSwitch_LlossLgain
desc: Threshold for (L_gain − L_loss) / L_gain to trigger phase transition.

name: use_adaptive_solver
desc: Use the adaptive ODE solver for the energy-driven phase. If False, falls back to the original solver.

name: cool_alpha
desc: Cooling parameter α = v_2 · t_now / R_2.

name: cool_beta
desc: Cooling parameter β = −dP_b/dt.

name: cool_delta
desc: Cooling parameter δ = dT/dt.

name: path_cooling_CIE
desc: Cooling curve for CIE (T > 10^5.5 K). Presets: 1=CLOUDY HII, 2=CLOUDY+grains, 3=Gnat & Ferland 2012, 4=Sutherland & Dopita 0.15Z.

name: path_cooling_nonCIE
desc: Path to non-CIE cooling curves (T < 10^5.5 K).

name: path_sps
desc: Path to Starburst99 stellar population files.

name: mu_atom
desc: Mean molecular weight of neutral atomic gas (HI + He). μ = 14/11.

name: mu_ion
desc: Mean molecular weight of fully ionized gas (H+ + He++). μ = 14/23.

name: mu_mol
desc: Mean molecular weight of molecular gas (H2 + He). μ = 14/6.

name: mu_convert
desc: Mass density conversion factor (n to ρ).

name: TShell_neu
desc: Neutral shell temperature.

name: TShell_ion
desc: Ionized shell temperature.

name: dust_sigma
desc: Dust cross-section at solar metallicity.

name: dust_noZ
desc: Metallicity below which dust is negligible.

name: dust_KappaIR
desc: Rosseland mean dust opacity κ_IR.

name: gamma_adia
desc: Adiabatic index.

name: caseB_alpha
desc: Case B recombination coefficient.

name: C_thermal
desc: Thermal conduction coefficient.

name: c_light
desc: Speed of light.

name: G
desc: Gravitational constant.

name: k_B
desc: Boltzmann constant.

name: PISM
desc: ISM pressure P/k_B.

name: bubble_xi_Tb
desc: Relative radius ξ = r/R_2 for measuring bubble temperature.
